channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Intel’s Redemption Arc for PC Gaming Starts With Midrange Desktop CPUs
item.description: Intel Core Ultra 200S Plus likely won’t beat AMD’s best X3D chips, but Intel promises its "best gaming performance" ever.

item.title: This Digital Picture Frame Wants to Bring People Closer to a Holographic Future
item.description: Brooklyn-based Looking Glass has been dabbling in 3D screens for nearly a decade. It's finally launching Musubi, an AI-powered holographic frame to bring your photos and videos to life.

item.title: Testing Lego’s Smart Bricks with my two kids
item.description: I was about to be the coolest dad ever. I'd prepared the magic words: "Do you want to help daddy test the new Lego Smart Bricks? I can pick you up from school early!" It worked. My kids literally jumped for joy. When The Lego Group announced in January that a tiny computer brick would […]

item.title: Intel announces Core Ultra 270K Plus and 250K Plus, its ‘fastest gaming desktop processors ever’
item.description: Intel hasn't made it easy to buy a flagship desktop chip. The company's 2022 and 2023 Raptor Lake chips ran hot, power-hungry, and had those infamous crashes, while 2024's Arrow Lake-based Core Ultra 9 285K had lackluster gaming performance that the company has tried to address with updates. Now, Intel claims it has finally surpassed […]

item.title: You can soon listen to Apple Music inside of TikTok — and artists get paid for it
item.description: Apple Music subscribers will soon be able to listen to full-length music tracks on TikTok without having to leave the TikTok app. The platforms have teamed up to launch two new features - Play Full Song and Listening Party - that allow users to connect their accounts and open an Apple Music player directly within […]

item.title: TikTok now lets Apple Music subscribers play full songs without leaving the app
item.description: TikTok, which is known for shaping music trends and viral songs, said the new feature is designed to make it easier to go from the moment of discovery to deeper listening.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 3 on Apple TV?
item.description: Want to know when you can watch episode 3 of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2? Inquire within.

item.title: Looking Glass' Musubi showcases its holographic display in a consumer-friendly package
item.description: Looking Glass has been doggedly committed to making holographic displays the next big thing since 2019, and with its new Musubi digital photo frame, it might finally be offering its tech at a price that's hard to deny. Musubi is scheduled to start shipping in June, and unlike the company's previous, more developer-focused kits, the company's new display only costs $149.Musubi is a 7-inch frame with a glass border and white matte that acts as the home for whatever content you convert and upload to it. Looking Glass says the Musubi can store up to 1,000 images or 30-second video clips, and is ab...

item.title: Google officially acquires Wiz for $32B
item.description: Google has officially acquired Israeli cybersecurity firm Wiz for $32 billion in all-cash, a full year after the companies announced the deal. This marks Google's biggest acquisition in its history.

item.title: Test des Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro : Samsung joue enfin dans la cour des grands
item.description: Nouveau woofer élargi, tweeter planaire magnétique, ANC 2.0, boîtier à capot transparent, contrôles repensés, les Galaxy Buds 4 Pro veulent se faire entendre. Sur le papier, la progression est nette. À l'écoute, elle se confirme. Reste à savoir si Samsung a enfin rattrapé Apple et Sony sur leur terrain.

item.title: Wahoo KICKR Run Treadmill review: One of the most impressive indoor experiences money can buy – if you have the budget
item.description: The Wahoo KICKR Run gets five stars for performance, but high cost prevents complete perfection.

item.title: I’m a big fan of Orico’s USB 3.0 hard drive enclosure for accessing old drives on the go, and it’s 15% off for Amazon Spring Deal Days
item.description: Forget buying expensive portable SSDs, Orico’s USB 3.0 enclosure is under £6 for Amazon's Spring Deal Days.

item.title: Ce pack de trackers connectés est 4 fois moins cher qu’un pack de AirTags 2 pendant les ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Ugreen s'est lui aussi lancé sur le marché des balises de tracking Bluetooth pour concurrencer Apple et Samsung. Son pack de quatre FineTrack G Tag, compatible Find Hub, est d'ailleurs bien moins cher que ceux de ses rivaux. Pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon, on le trouve à 29,99 euros au lieu de 49,99 euros.

item.title: I tracked down the 9 best business laptops under £500 in the whole Amazon Spring Deal Days sale
item.description: These are the budget business laptops I'd buy for professional work in Amazon's Spring sale.

item.title: Microsoft's year of fixing Windows 11 is off to a promising start, as latest update improves stability — but it still has a lot more work to do
item.description: Microsoft continues to deliver its promised Windows 11 fixes in a new update that improves reliability in many ways.

item.title: Russian hackers target HR departments with vicious new 'BlackSanta' malware
item.description: The malware is described as an 'EDR killer', stopping security solutions and suppressing notifications.

item.title: The £24 travel router I actually use for VPN security is 15% off in Amazon's Spring Sale
item.description: I recommend GL.iNet’s Mango travel router with OpenWrt, VPN support, and 300Mbps Wi-Fi, and it’s 15% off for Amazon Spring Deal Days.

item.title: Switch 2 : l’étrange choix de Nintendo qui lui fait perdre de l’argent au Japon
item.description: Selon un analyste japonais, Nintendo perdrait environ 160 dollars pour chaque Switch 2 vendue au Japon dans sa version moins chère, réservée au marché local.

item.title: OpenAI’s delayed ‘adult mode’ underscores the challenges of age-gating AI
item.description: A lot is riding on OpenAI’s ability to separate older ChatGPT users from younger ones. OpenAI confirmed on March 6 that it is delaying the rollout of “adult mode” in ChatGPT, a feature that would give verified adults access to less-restricted content. The company first announced plans to begin age-gating users last year but has now pushed back the launch twice. Segregating adult users from minors could help in some of OpenAI’s legal and revenue challenges, but nailing the technology may not be easy. ...

item.title: Meta Ramps Up Efforts to Disrupt Industrialized Scamming
item.description: Meta removed 10.9 million Facebook and Instagram accounts linked to “criminal scam centers” last year, the company announced on Wednesday.

item.title: The 7 best cordless vacuums for 2026
item.description: A good cordless stick vacuum cleaner gives you the freedom to move from room to room without dragging a cable or hunting for the nearest outlet. They’re lighter than a typical corded vacuum and often easier to store, making them ideal for quick jobs as well as deep cleans. Many of the best vacuum cleaners now come in bagless designs, with powerful suction and smart features that make it simple to clean up anything from crumbs on the kitchen floor to dust on high shelves.Some models go beyond basic convenience, with features like auto-empty docks that transfer debris straight into a larger bin,...

item.title: One of the Year’s Worst Sci-Fi Films (So Far) Is Coming Home
item.description: 'Mercy,' starring Chris Pratt and Rebecca Ferguson, is now on digital and coming to physical April 7.

item.title: The Fort Strength Training Wearable Tracks Your Sets (2026)
item.description: You don’t have to be a gym bro to get strong. Three ex-Tesla engineers made a beautiful bar velocity tracker for every kind of weight lifter.

item.title: Nick Clegg Doesn’t Want to Talk About Superintelligence
item.description: After leaving Meta last year, the former deputy prime minister of the UK is charting a new path in the AI industry that has nothing to do with AGI.

item.title: How Trump’s war on Iran stranded a million fliers — and plunged the Gulf’s favorite playground into chaos
item.description: It was a little after 1PM on Friday, February 28th, and Samantha Lujano was about to board her flight from Dubai to Colombo, Sri Lanka, when the drone attacks began. She had already received her boarding pass and gone through customs. Her flight was at the gate and her bags were loaded. She was simply […]

item.title: Nvidia’s head of autonomous driving opens up about his plan to beat Waymo and Tesla
item.description: Every six months or so, Nvidia's head of automotive, Xinzhou Wu, invites CEO Jensen Huang to go for a ride in a vehicle equipped with the company's hands-free autonomous driving system. But only when Wu has "good confidence" in the system's driving capabilities. Recently, the two went for a drive from Woodside, California, to downtown […]

item.title: Zoox plans to put its robotaxis on the Uber app in Vegas this year
item.description: The purpose-built robotaxis will be available on Uber's app in Las Vegas this year, and Los Angeles next year, if Zoox gets the federal approval it's been seeking.

item.title: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet: Why AI skills are now required for promotion
item.description: Sweet explains why leaders must understand AI, why companies should fix broken processes before investing in advanced models, and why she’s doubling down on entry-level hiring even as automation accelerates. AI disruption and geopolitical upheaval are forcing business leaders to make high-stakes decisions—fast. Accenture CEO Julie Sweet shares what she’s hearing from her 9,000 clients, and the hard-won advice she’s giving them. Sweet reveals why AI proficiency is now a requirement for promotion at Accenture, why she’s doubling down on entry-level hiring amid the automation wave, and she unpack...

item.title: Another Trump-Epstein statue pops up on the National Mall
item.description: ‘The King of the World’ is the latest installation satirizing the president’s relationship with Epstein from a prolific anonymous art group. On the morning of March 10, a 12-foot-tall golden statue featuring President Donald Trump embracing the now-deceased convicted child sex offender Jeffrey Epstein appeared on the lawn of the National Mall.

item.title: You can now get a 'game changer' of an app update for Sonos on Android — and it brings back a key feature
item.description: If you're a user of the Sonos Android app, you can once again control playback and volume from the notification shade and lock screen.

item.title: Anthropic is opening an office in DC while battling Pentagon in court
item.description: Anthropic has launched a new research initiative called Anthropic Institute and has revealed that its Public Policy team is opening its first office in Washington, DC this spring. The company has made the announcement just a couple of days after it sued the US government to challenge the supply chain risk designation it received from the Defense Department. As Axios notes, Anthropic is tripling its Public Policy team at a time when AI companies are establishing a presence in Washington, so that they can influence future policies around artificial intelligence. In Anthropic’s case, it might hav...

item.title: Vous pouvez utiliser Shazam directement dans ChatGPT
item.description: La stratégie d'OpenAi d'intégration des applications directement dans ChatGPT connaît un nouvel ajout de poids : Shazam est désormais utilisable directement depuis l'interface du chatbot.

item.title: EnGenius ECW520 budget Wi-Fi 7 access point review
item.description: The EnGenius ECW520 budget Wi-Fi 7 access point delivers excellent range and 11 Gbps throughput between devices.

item.title: I tried the Shazam app for ChatGPT – and it’s a surprisingly natural fit for the chatbot
item.description: Apple’s Shazam has arrived inside ChatGPT, allowing users to identify songs and turn them into playlists.

item.title: 8 must-have accessories I'm buying to pair with my Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Now that the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is here, I'm looking at picking up these 8 must-have accessories to get the most out of my new phone.

item.title: These affordable gaming controllers are some of the best around and they come from a brand that you probably haven't heard of
item.description: Amazon has slashed the price of some highly desirable controllers.

item.title: 12 perfect, last-minute Mothers' Day gifts from just £12 in the Amazon Spring Sale
item.description: Forgot about Mothers' Day again? The Spring Sale is your best friend.

item.title: Le printemps approche et cette tondeuse boostée à l’IA coupe 300 euros de son prix pour fêter les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: La MOVA LiDAX Ultra 1000 AWD est une tondeuse puissante capable de fonctionner même sur des pentes inclinées à quasiment 40 degrés. Pendant les Ventes Flash d'Amazon, la bête perd 300 euros de son prix pour les abonnés Prime.

item.title: Best Indoor Garden Systems: We’ve Been Testing All Year (2026)
item.description: Grow a backyard’s worth of greens and vegetables in your house with a vertical hydroponic garden. Here are a few that might be worth the investment.

item.title: Microsoft 365 confirms new premium tier focused on AI and productivity
item.description: Microsoft's third wave of Copilot is all about agentic AI – Copilot Cowork is your autonomous assistant and Agent 365 manages agents like humans.

item.title: Shein, Temu : la nouvelle taxe sur les petits colis chinois tourne déjà au fiasco
item.description: Le gouvernement pensait avoir trouvé l'arme fatale pour freiner la folie acheteuse sur les plateformes asiatiques. Quelques jours seulement après son entrée en vigueur, la taxe de deux euros sur les petits colis montre déjà ses limites face à la parade logistique des géants du e-commerce.

item.title: Amazon continue son ménage de printemps avec ses ventes flash exceptionnelles : voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Comme chaque année, Amazon fête l'arrivée du printemps avec des ventes flash étalées sur plusieurs jours, l'occasion pour les petits férus de Tech que nous sommes de dénicher les meilleurs bons plans sur les smartphones, tablettes, PC portables... Voici nos recommandations !

item.title: Pokémon TCG: First Partner Illustration Collection Series 1 preorders are live at Amazon — buy now for under $70
item.description: Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection preorders are live at Amazon. Buy now for under $70 at Amazon

item.title: Dairy Queen announces Free Cone Day for 2026 — how to claim your free cone
item.description: On March 19, celebrate Free Cone Day 2026 at Dairy Queen. Score a free vanilla soft-serve cone at participating Dairy Queen locations.

item.title: RayNeo Air 4 Pro glasses are finally live at Amazon — save $50 with this coupon code
item.description: Get the best smart glasses deal. Save $50 on the RayNeo Air 4 Pro glasses at Amazon.

item.title: Nvidia dégainerait bientôt une nouvelle RTX abordable… dotée d’une quantité de VRAM inhabituelle
item.description: Les rumeurs se font plus précises au sujet d'une nouvelle variante de la RTX 5050. Attendue sur l'entrée de gamme, probablement à l'issue du Computex, cette référence s'équiperait de 9 Go de mémoire vidéo GDDR7. On en apprend aujourd'hui un peu plus à son propos.
